subcodes.first_line: O My Name! The servant who was present laid before Our presence the letter of the Afnán which bore thy name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی عبد حاضر مکتوب افنان را که باسم شما بود لدی الوجه معروض داشت
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
